title: Fix Reddit read-only signal collection
description: Investigate why Reddit public JSON/API calls fail in the daily incubator and implement a robust read-only fallback if needed. Acceptance: single subreddit smoke test returns usable public signal data or clear fallback; cron prompt/docs mention working method; validation passes.

title: Add competitor gate to daily incubator
description: Make competitor and substitute analysis mandatory in daily idea briefs, scoring, templates, and cron prompt. Acceptance: AGENTS/docs/templates updated; cron prompt updated; validation passes; local commit references this bead.

title: Move incubator into workspace layout
description: Create a dedicated workspace folder for the 100-days incubator: one directory for the master index repo and one sibling directory for per-app project repos. Update local cron workdir after moving.
close_reason: Done in e64cbb0; workspace split is /index + /projects and cron points at new index workdir.

title: Prepare main repo local operating rules
description: Tighten the local 100-days-100-apps repository for offline/local-first operation: detailed AGENTS.md mission, daily workflow, Beads-only rules, repo creation policy, and verification while GitHub push is blocked.
close_reason: Done in f6538b3; local-first workflow, AGENTS.md, and repo template prepared.

title: Tune source list after first week of results
